About Me

A little bit about who I am

Hi, I'm Wesley Deland. I'm a software engineer based in Texas. I build things with code - sometimes for work, sometimes for fun.

What I Do

  • Full-stack development
  • Cloud infrastructure
  • Automation and tooling
  • Breaking things and fixing them

Tech I Use

I work with a variety of tools and technologies including C#, .NET, Azure, Angular, TypeScript, Blazor, SQL Server, and Astro.

Get In Touch

Find me on GitHub, LinkedIn, or send me an email at mail@wesleydeland.com.

Check out the Journal to see what I've been writing about.
